title: Trump presses Syria to take on Hezbollah, raising alarm in Lebanon and Israel

snapshot.title: Trump presses Syria to take on Hezbollah, raising alarm in Lebanon and Israel
snapshot.description: BEIRUT: As the White House has soured on Israel’s war with Hezbollah in Lebanon, US President Donald Trump has shocked many in the region by pushing an alternative: Let Syria fight the Iran-backed militant group instead. He has suggested that the battle-hardened and Islamist-led insurgents who overthrew Syria’s autocratic President Bashar Assad a year and a half ago and formed
snapshot.author: AP
snapshot.pageTitle: Trump presses Syria to take on Hezbollah, raising alarm in Lebanon and Israel | Arab News
